issuesFixed.description: Image inner frame used `md:aspect-auto md:h-full` on desktop, but `md:h-full` had no effect because the parent anchor has no explicit height. Image appeared tiny on desktop.
issuesFixed.fix: Removed `md:aspect-auto md:h-full` from the inner image frame div. Now uses `aspect-[4/3]` at all breakpoints, giving the image consistent proportional height that matches the Figma design at every viewport size.

issuesFixed.description: Content half used `justify-between` with no min-height, so there was no extra space to distribute — the button sat directly under the excerpt with no breathing room.
issuesFixed.fix: Removed `justify-between` from the content half div (no longer needed). Added `mb-6` to the text content group div, providing a fixed 24px gap between the text block and the CTA button regardless of card height.

validationResults.notes: All warnings pre-existing in other blocks. Sync warning (InspectorControls vs section root) is expected for this editor-controls-only TSX pattern.

output.screenshotNotes: 1440px screenshot confirms: image areas render with proper 4:3 proportions at desktop, content halves have clear visual spacing between text and CTA button.
